mapper.select: SELECT trading_date FROM trading_date WHERE trading_date <= #{holdingDate} ORDER BY trading_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT trading_date FROM trading_date WHERE trading_date > #{holdingDate} ORDER BY trading_date ASC LIMIT #{num}, 1
SELECT trading_date FROM trading_date WHERE trading_date <= (SELECT trading_date FROM trading_date WHERE trading_date <= now() ORDER BY trading_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY trading_date DESC LIMIT 21
